hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and normalizes multiple blockchain analytics and compliance provider outputs into one streamlined case workflow with audit-ready evidence and structured review.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case workflows depend on disconnected analytics
problem_description: Compliance teams managing digital asset cases struggle to unify outputs from multiple blockchain analytics providers. This separation slows risk assessment, creates gaps in case evidence, and complicates audit readiness across workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates multiple blockchain analytics outputs into a single case management workflow, connecting alerts, evidence, reviewer actions and decision logs to streamline risk assessment and support audit-ready cases.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to case decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates and normalizes analytics from multiple providers then routes results through review, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated analytics. One compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple blockchain analytics outputs into structured cases, decisions, evidence and workflows to support clearer, audit-ready compliance operations for digital asset teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with operational control, audit-grade evidence preservation and enterprise deployment for managing complex digital asset workflows securely and transparently.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for digital asset compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and analytics outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions, evidence and reports for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage multi-provider cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates outputs from multiple blockchain analytics and compliance providers into connected case workflows, applying policies, routing reviews, creating linked cases and preserving decision records within one system.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by maintaining comprehensive case histories, decision logs, provider results and linked supporting data to support review readiness and regulatory inspection preparation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without replacing them, normalizing their outputs into one operational compliance layer with configurable roles and access.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured compliance workflows, allowing businesses to maintain their existing provider relationships while improving operational efficiency and auditability.
final_title: Connect blockchain analytics into connected case workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY orchestrates multiple provider outputs into structured cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
